latestDirtyPackageRefreshStatus: source-feedback Task 3 residual selected-spell route-task queue, Task 8 six-driver active reducer diagnostic seed, FCSF-04 object stale public route-history evidence, FCSF-05 reaction/interrupt payload taxonomy evidence, FCSF-06 character/sheet/handoff rejection and resource payload evidence, SQNT-07B/C/D feature-species-metamagic route evidence, and SQNT-07A selected-spatial composition route evidence are packaged in cleanroom-input. FEXP-08 fresh replay accepted all 10 selected-spatial route surfaces through public reducer entrypoints at fresh target 64f7fad1902a7617264cbddf8d6eb236c786e8dd. FEXP-09A fresh replay accepted all 3 SQNT-07D active-feature spell-benefit rows through public reducer entrypoints at fresh target eaaefdbb1172b37b75f9a29ca3132f8e547cd2f1. FEXP-09B fresh replay accepted all 15 SQNT-07B species/passive-adjacent rows through public reducer entrypoints at fresh target aa2a77374c9dcfb3923643418795cd0572ce9ee6, with 2 inherited Adrenaline Rush rows kept out of scope. FEXP-09C fresh replay accepted all 12 SQNT-07C Quickened/governor rows through public reducer entrypoints at fresh target e47a0dd21a59b164f5478dfa1eb0ae056aa13b6b after follow-up review fixed selected-target ownership and non-sentinel rejection construction. Earlier current-package claims are historical after the 545d784 package refresh unless separately replayed against that package.

laneSizingPolicy.reason: Fresh expansion lanes should stay smaller than dirty rehearsal lanes because each accepted row must also strengthen verifier coverage and cleanroom-boundary evidence.

lanes.acceptanceSummary: Accepted at fresh target e47a0dd21a59b164f5478dfa1eb0ae056aa13b6b. The 545d784 current package replay accepts all 12 SQNT-07C Quickened/governor rows through copied Quickened driver facts, copied metamagic route connector facts, and public reducer entrypoints. Follow-up review fixed two blockers before acceptance: target-bearing Quickened outcomes no longer duplicate target ids from public TargetChoice fills, and rejected outcomes use a non-sentinel rejection kind so Rejected(None) is unrepresentable. Checks passed: focused FEXP-09C verifier, current fresh target verifier, cargo fmt --check, cargo test, cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings, and git diff --check.
